message:
🐛 Fix CKS WVA test target: use test-e2e-openshift (no kind dependency) (#797)

The `test-e2e` Makefile target requires `kind` to be installed, which is
not available on the CKS self-hosted runners. The `test-e2e-openshift`
target runs the same e2e tests without the kind prerequisite check and
works on any real Kubernetes cluster.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,5 +71,5 @@ jobs:
       skip_cleanup: ${{ github.event.inputs.skip_cleanup == 'true' }}
       required_gpus: 2
       recommended_gpus: 4
-      test_target: test-e2e
+      test_target: test-e2e-openshift
     secrets: inherit
